name: antigravity-proxy
description: Access Claude & Gemini models via Google Antigravity OAuth. Auto-starts a local OpenAI-compatible proxy when ZCode launches — no manual setup needed.

interface.longDescription: Access Claude Opus/Sonnet and Gemini 3/2.5 models through Google Antigravity OAuth. The proxy auto-starts when ZCode launches — install, login once, and use any model.
defaultPrompt: Login to Antigravity with my Google account.
Set up the Antigravity provider in ZCode.
